channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Beloved Party Game Gets Review-Bombed Over AI Video Contest - Kotaku
item.description:
1. Beloved Party Game Gets Review-Bombed Over AI Video Contest  Kotaku
  2. Steam devs' $75,000 AI video contest backfires in the most predictable way  Polygon.com
  3. Developers of Party Animals announce an AI video contest - game gets a review bomb  GamingOnLinux
  4. A Once-Popular Indie Game Is Being Roasted For Hosting A Lucrative AI Video Contest Where Plagiarism Gets You Disqualified  OpenCritic
  5. Party Animals dev apologizes for AI video contest, will leave its fate up to a vote  Shacknews

item.title: The Razr Fold is stuck in the middle - The Verge
item.description:
1. The Razr Fold is stuck in the middle  The Verge
  2. Motorola Razr Fold review: Fits neatly in your pocket but not your budget  Ars Technica
  3. Motorola’s Razr Fold Is a Solid Phone Arriving at the Worst Time  Bloomberg.com
  4. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 vs. Pixel 10 Pro Fold vs. Motorola Razr Fold - this model wins for me  ZDNET
  5. A pair of smart glasses turns your Razr Fold into a full-fledged laptop  Android Central

item.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: Ubisoft Launches Real-Life $500,000 Treasure Hunt, But You Have To Pay To Participate - Game Informer
item.description:
1. Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: Ubisoft Launches Real-Life $500,000 Treasure Hunt, But You Have To Pay To Participate  Game Informer
  2. Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Promotion Kicks Off a Real World Treasure Hunt  OpenCritic
  3. Real-World Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Treasure Hunt Includes $500,000 In Gold Coins  GameSpot
  4. Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Fans Can Compete in Ubisoft’s Real-World $500K Treasure Hunt  HotHardware
  5. Embark on a thrilling treasure hunt and take your shot at winning $500,000  Ubisoft

item.title: Why Apple is Putting Cameras in the New AirPods Pro 4 (Ultra) - Geeky Gadgets
item.description:

item.title: iPhone 17 Pro has the fastest charging speed of 33 phones tested - 9to5Mac
item.description:
1. iPhone 17 Pro has the fastest charging speed of 33 phones tested  9to5Mac
  2. We Tested 33 New Phones to See Which Charge Fastest and Crown 2 Winners  CNET
  3. iPhone 17 Pro beats 32 smartphones in charging speed test  Cult of Mac
  4. iPhone 17 Pro Ranked No. 1 in Charging Test Across 33 Smartphones  The Mac Observer
  5. iPhone 17 Pro Tops Global Charging Speed Rankings, Beating 33 Flagship Smartphones in New Lab Test  The Eastern Herald
